title: Spring Batch Job Execution
description: Represents the execution of a Spring Batch job instance. Contains all metadata about a single run of a job including timing, status, and step execution details.

id.description: Unique identifier for this job execution.

jobId.description: Identifier of the job instance this execution belongs to.

jobName.description: Name of the job being executed.

startTime.description: Timestamp when the job execution started.

endTime.description: Timestamp when the job execution ended. Null if still running.

status.description: Current batch status of the job execution.

exitCode.description: Exit code indicating the final state. Typically COMPLETED, FAILED, or a custom exit code.

exitDescription.description: Human-readable description of the exit condition, including any exception messages.

jobParameters.description: Parameters used to identify and parameterize this job execution.

stepExecutions.description: List of step execution records for each step run during this job execution.

createTime.description: Timestamp when this job execution record was created in the job repository.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to this execution record.

version.description: Optimistic locking version number for the job execution record.

StepExecution.title: Step Execution
StepExecution.description: Represents the execution of a single step within a job execution.

id.description: Unique identifier for this step execution.

status.description: Current batch status of the step execution.

readSkipCount.description: Number of items skipped during reading.

processSkipCount.description: Number of items skipped during processing.

writeSkipCount.description: Number of items skipped during writing.

filterCount.description: Number of items filtered by an ItemProcessor returning null.

startTime.description: Timestamp when this step execution started.

endTime.description: Timestamp when this step execution ended.

exitCode.description: Exit code for the step execution.

exitDescription.description: Exit description message for the step.
